nodes.name: Notion: Query Topic Queue
nodes.notes: Set REPLACE_LINKEDIN_TOPIC_QUEUE_DATABASE_ID in topicQueueQueryUrl (top of build script). Database: LinkedIn Topic Queue; Status select must include Ready; Topic column (name Topic).

propertyValues.textContent: No rows with Status=Ready in LinkedIn Topic Queue.

nodes.name: Notion: BD Intelligence (queue empty)
nodes.notes: Add select option queue_empty to BD Intelligence action column (or remap key).

nodes.name: Buffer: Create Post (LinkedIn)
nodes.notes: Install @bufferapp/n8n-nodes-buffer (Community nodes). Replace REPLACE_BUFFER_ORGANIZATION_ID and REPLACE_BUFFER_LINKEDIN_CHANNEL_ID with IDs from Buffer (or re-pick in UI). LinkedIn personal channel required.

nodes.name: HTTP: PATCH Topic Queue Published
nodes.notes: Notion page IDs may include hyphens; URL uses UUID without hyphens. If PATCH fails, verify property names Status and PublishedAt on LinkedIn Topic Queue database.

nodes.name: Notion: Connection Queue (reply draft)
nodes.notes: Add columns to LinkedIn Connection Queue: reply_text, post_id, comment_author, comment_text, topic, Status (include Needs Reply), CreatedAt. Map keys if your Notion names differ.

parameters.subject: =LinkedIn reply ready — {{ $('Validate Mode Inputs').first().json.comment_author }}
parameters.message:
={{ 'Your draft reply:

' + ($('Quality Gate (>= 50 chars)').first().json.generated_content || '') + '

--- Original comment ---
' + $('Validate Mode Inputs').first().json.comment_text + '

post_id: ' + $('Validate Mode Inputs').first().json.post_id + '

Post this manually on LinkedIn. No comment API is used (Buffer does not support LinkedIn comments).' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'reply_ready', reply_text: $('Quality Gate (>= 50 chars)').first().json.generated_content, post_id: $('Validate Mode Inputs').first().json.post_id }) }}

parameters.subject: =LinkedIn automation: published OK via Buffer ({{ $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.action }})
parameters.message:
={{ 'Buffer/status: ' + $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.statusCode + '

Preview:
' + ($('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.generated_content || '').substring(0, 400) + '

Buffer response:
' + $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.buffer_body }}

nodes.name: Notion: BD Intelligence (success)
nodes.notes: REPLACE_BD_INTELLIGENCE_DATABASE_ID — errors and successes use this DB. Keys: logged_at, action, content_preview, topic (success) | error_at, error_type, error_body, content_preview (errors).

nodes.name: Notion: BD Intelligence (error)
nodes.notes: Single error stream (BD Intelligence). Select options: quality_fail, buffer_fail, claude_fail.

parameters.subject: =LinkedIn automation: quality gate blocked publish

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, action: $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.action, statusCode: $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.statusCode }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, error: $('Validate Mode Inputs').first().json._error || 'validation_failed' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: false, stage: 'buffer', statusCode: $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.statusCode, detail: $('Merge Buffer Response').item.json.buffer_body }) }}
